justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions from the user throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternatives for the next day or week but did not proactively suggest alternative contact methods until much later in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls, checking each day individually when the user requested a full week, leading to many unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and the agent's inability to proactively offer a solution (like an online meeting) earlier in the conversation made the experience frustrating for the customer.

overall_notes: The agent was able to successfully book an appointment after many turns, but the process was inefficient due to repeated checks for unavailable phone slots.
